# Polytetrafluoroethylene's General Guide for Migrating and Optimizing Modpacks to Cleanroom

### 1. Move the pack to Cleanroom Loader
   - **(Prism/MultiMC)** - Download the latest [Cleanroom Loader MMC instance](https://download.cleanroommc.com) and copy the `minecraft` (or `.minecraft`) folder from the Hexxit Updated instance to it.
   - **(CurseForge/Modrinth/ATLauncher/GDLauncher)** - Install the Cleanroom Relauncher mod

### 2. Update:
   - All these [mods](/mods-n-stuff/1.12.2.md) if they are present
   - JEI Utilities
   - CraftTweaker
   - Corail Tombstone
   - Had Enough Items

### 3. Replace 
   - Just Enough Items -> Had Enough Items
   - Shadowfacts' Forgelin -> Forgelin-Continuous
   - Mouse Tweaks -> Mouse Tweaks Unofficial
   - NotEnoughIDs -> Roughly Enough IDs
   - Just Enough IDs -> Roughly Enough IDs
   - LibrarianLib -> LibrarianLib-Continuous
   - Quark -> Quark: RotN Edition

### 4. Install:
   - Fugue
   - Scalar Legacy

### 5. Remove:
   - Phosphor
   - Hesperus
   - MixinBooter
   - MixinBootstrap
   - BetterFPS
   - ConfigAnytime
   - Old Java Warning
   - VanillaFix
   - AI Improvements
   - FastFurnace
   - FastWorkbench
   - FermiumASM
   - AttributeFix
   - Entity Culling (by Meldexun)
   - FoamFix

### 6. Make sure you have all of [these mods](/mods-n-stuff/1.12.2.md) installed and configured accordingly
